calendar.matters:
Claim Escheated Property
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Richard Tosaw appearing by phone for petitioner. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. No objection. Matter granted. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Gena Eales CSR# 9176. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

Claim Escheated Property
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Continued To May-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Claim Escheated Property
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Continued To Apr-23-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Claim Escheated Property
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Continued To Apr-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Tosaw (Counsel for Melanie Rocher, Petitioner); Jonathan Ferdon (Counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator).

Referencing and continuing the discussion had with respect to Case No. 255520 concerning escheatment, Mr. Ferdon noted certain exigencies of this case that merited further discussion concerning notice to certain other potential heirs. After said discussion, the Court continued the matter to April 2, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. to allow Mr. Tosaw is to give notice of the hearing to the Mother of the Petitioner.

Judicial Officer: Dorothy McMath, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katie Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Jimmy Peralta; Court Examiner: None; Court Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

Claim Escheated Property
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Continued To Feb-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Claim Escheated Property
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Continued To Jan-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Claim Escheated Property
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Continued To Dec-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Richard Tosaw appearing by phone for petitioner. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. Issues addressed. Court wants to establish a guideline on how to do this. Mr. Tosaw will file an amended petition by 11/27. He is to recite the attemps he made to collect. He is to describe the relationship and how he arrive at this person in a narrative form. Matter is continued to 12/11. Mr. Tosaw will appear by phone. Court will notify counsel of the time.
In the future, Mr. Tosaw is to file the claim with his affidavit in support with The County Treasurer. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
